generated_oml:
instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor network for data acquisition from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensorNetwork
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw sensor data collected from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler, MonitoringSystemEnabler
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric model for structural dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADSoftwareEnabler
]

instance DynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based analytical model for dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler, FaultDetectionAlgorithmEnabler, StateEstimationAlgorithmEnabler, OptimizationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance CADSoftwareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design software for geometric modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for parameter estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance MonitoringSystemEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring systems for performance assessment"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Specialized algorithms for fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Specialized algorithms for state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Specialized algorithms for optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and prediction services to model Physical Twin's behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms to identify anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation techniques for system state determination"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization services to improve system efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control functions for system management"
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryControlAction
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted system behavior under current conditions"
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time system status for safety and optimization"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection in system behavior"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current system state determined through estimation techniques"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal system configuration for efficiency"
]

instance SupervisoryControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustments to Physical Twin based on insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
